hero.headline: The future is built with truth.
hero.subtext: VerumForma delivers superior quality construction for clients who value what lasts — from the first site visit to the final inspection.

about.label: About VerumForma
about.headline: Serious construction, for demanding clients.
about.body1: From the first meeting to final delivery, we accompany every phase with rigour and transparency. We work with a limited project portfolio per year — because quality and attention to detail are not compatible with volume.
about.body2: Our team brings decades of experience in commercial, residential and industrial construction across Portugal.
about.stat1_label: Projects completed across Portugal, from luxury housing to civil infrastructure.
about.stat2_label: Years in the sector, with a reputation built project by project.
about.stat3_label: Of projects delivered on time, with no surprises for the client.

items.title: Residential construction
items.description: Houses and apartments conceived in close collaboration with the client and their architecture team.

items.title: Commercial and industrial construction
items.description: Commercial buildings, warehouses and industrial infrastructure with technical rigour and deadline compliance.

items.title: Renovation and finishing
items.description: Interior and structural interventions in operating buildings, minimising operational impact.

items.title: Real estate investment
items.description: Identification and development of real estate opportunities with solid returns and in-house execution.

items.title: Real estate agency
items.description: Our own agents for buying, selling and renting — with technical knowledge most agencies lack.

items.title: Interior design consultancy
items.description: Specialist support in defining finishes, materials and interior solutions for your project.

steps.title: Contact & quote
steps.description: We receive your request and assess the project. Whenever possible, we meet on site.

steps.title: Proposal & negotiation
steps.description: We produce a detailed, transparent quote. We negotiate until we reach a fair agreement for both parties.

steps.title: Contract & start
steps.description: We sign a contract with all conditions defined. Work begins on the agreed date, with no surprises.

steps.title: Execution & follow-up
steps.description: Regular meetings with the client at every phase. A single dedicated point of contact for your project.

steps.title: Delivery & guarantees
steps.description: Formal handover with final payment. Post-completion follow-up and compliance with all legal guarantees.

testimonial.label: What they say about us
testimonial.quote: Working with VerumForma was an exceptional experience. The project was delivered on time, within budget and to a standard of finish that exceeded our expectations.
testimonial.author: Ana Pereira

team.label: Our team
team.headline: The people behind the work.
team.subtext: An experienced, committed team with decades of presence in Portugal's construction sector.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.headline: Let's talk about your project.
contact.subtext: We accept a limited number of projects per year to ensure every client gets the attention they deserve. Get in touch to start the conversation.
contact.form_success: Message sent. We will be in touch shortly.

footer.tagline: The future is built with truth.
